solutions.solution: (b) Given equation is 18 × 12 + 4 - 8 ÷ 2. According to the question, after changing sign equation = 18 - 12 ÷ 4 + 8 × 2 = 18 - 3 + 16 = 34 - 3 = 31

(c) Let us check all the options one by one. From option (a), 8 × 20 + 3 + 9 - 5 = 38 ⇒ 3 × 20 + 8 + 9 - 5 = 38 ⇒ 3 × 20/8 + 9 - 5 = 38 ⇒ 3 × 5/2 + 9 - 5 = 38 ⇒ 15/2 + 9 - 5 = 38 ⇒ (15 + 18 - 10)/2 = 38 ⇒ 23/2 = 38 ∴ LHS ≠ RHS So, option (a) is incorrect. From option (b), 8 × 20 + 3 + 9 - 5 = 38 ⇒ 9 × 20 + 3 + 8 - 5 = 38 ⇒ 9 × 20/3 + 8 - 5 = 38 ⇒ 60 + 8 - 5 = 38 ⇒ 68 - 5 = 38 ⇒ 63 = 38 ∴ LHS ≠ RHS So, option (b) is incorrect. From option (c), 8 × 20 + 3 + 9 - 5 = 38 ⇒ 8 × 20 + 5 + 9 - 3 = 38 ⇒ 8 × 4 + 9 - 3 = 38 ⇒ 32 + 9 - 3 = 38 ⇒ 41 - 3 = 38 ⇒ 38 = 38 ∴ LHS = RHS So, option (c) is correct and there is no need to check option (d).

(b) Let us check all the options one by one. From option (a), 7 × 7 - 2 + 1 = 12 ⇒ 7 × 7 - 2 = 12 ⇒ 49 - 2 = 12 ⇒ 47 = 12 ∴ LHS ≠ RHS So, option (a) is incorrect. From option (b), 7 + 7 - 2 × 1 = 12 ⇒ 7 + 7 - 2 = 12 ⇒ 14 - 2 = 12 ⇒ 12 = 12 ∴ LHS = RHS So, option (b) is correct and there is no need to check other options.

(b) According to the question, P > R ...(i) R< Ss X ...(ii) Y = X ...(iii) On the combining statements (i), (ii) and (iii), we get P > R< Ss X = Y Conclusions I. P< S (false) II. Y >R (true) So, it is clear that only Conclusion II is true.
